raw_consumer_statement: I have an open claim with Citibank for a Home Depot Consumer Credit Card. I noticed a charge on my credit card statement for {$1500.00} dated XX/XX/XXXX. I immediately called Citibank customer service and they promptly opened a claim to investigate. The latest communication I have from them is a letter dated XX/XX/XXXX assuring me that the matter was still under investigation. I have not received any communication since. On XX/XX/XXXX I noticed a charge in my primary bank account for {$54.00} from " Home Depot. '' This charge was a " check '' that I did not authorize or sign. When I checked my account with Citibank ( which they have not allowed me to close or restrict during the investigation ) it was noted as a " Autopay Payment. '' I do not have an autopay plan set up, and I did not authorize an automatic payment. When I called to request additional information about what was going on, I was told that the claim was rejected and then the call was cut off. I have never been contacted about any investigation or provided with any information or documentation after making multiple phone calls and sending a physical letter to Citibank Resolve in XX/XX/XXXX requesting additional information.
